title: phyllostegia mannii
intro: Phyllostegia mannii, also known as Hawaiian hedge nettle, is a perennial plant native to the Hawaiian Islands and is part of the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia mannii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia mannii are often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
